summary: Designed a 5-phase testing strategy: (1) static contract lint script checking @-references, H-technique vocabulary, skill-to-agent wiring, and churn field coverage; (2) hard-mode wiring extension to validate-wiring.sh; (3) plan artifact extension to validate-artifact.sh for postmortem/phase-sizing checks; (4) handoff schema validation script; (5) runtime trace harness deferred. All phases are bash-based, follow existing lint patterns, no new infrastructure required.

artifacts.summary: Full taxonomy of static vs runtime contract properties; proposed lint rules for 4 script targets; phased implementation recommendation; index.json gap identified (convergence.md has empty load_when.agents).
